archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Quant/Institutional Crypto Variant)

layout.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout.spacing: Dense architecture. gap-4, p-4 to p-6. Optimize for data density.
layout.corners: rounded-sm (2px) to rounded-none. Strict, institutional edges. No bubbly radius.
layout.borders: Visible skeleton. Use 1px solid border-white/10 on almost all panels.

cards.hover: Subtle background shift to #1A1A1D, border brightens to #ffffff40. No lift/shadows.

buttons.primary: Solid #FCD535 (Binance Yellow), black text, font-bold, rounded-sm, hover:brightness-110
buttons.danger: Solid #EF4444, white text. For stop/emergency halt.
buttons.success: Solid #10B981, white text. For starting bot.

tables.style: Extremely dense. py-2 px-3 cells. JetBrains Mono for ALL numeric data.
tables.header: Sticky header, text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-400 border-b border-white/10.
tables.rows: Hover state: bg-white/5. Green/Red text for P&L columns.

navigation.style: Top horizontal terminal bar. Pure black (#000000) with 1px bottom border (#ffffff14).

charts.style: Deep black backgrounds. Candlestick or line charts using #10B981 (Up) and #EF4444 (Down). Grid lines: 1px solid #ffffff08.

animations.hover: Micro-interactions only. 150ms ease-in-out transitions on borders and backgrounds.
animations.status_indicator: Pulsing neon dot (w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 animate-pulse) next to 'BOT ACTIVE' text.
animations.data_feed: Flash green/red background briefly on rapid price changes.

images.description: Dark neon Bitcoin sign for the authentication screen or hero section.
Abstract dark tech motherboard texture to be used at 5% opacity inside empty states or the 'Algo Config' panel.
Stock trading chart reference if dynamic charts are loading.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against #050505 meets 4.5:1 ratio. Muted text must be at least #71717A.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Every button, input, tab, and row MUST have a kebab-case data-testid (e.g., data-testid='start-bot-btn', data-testid='daily-profit-metric').

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an automated trading bot designed for a user with NO finance knowledge but aiming for $1k/day on Binance.
Vibe: High-end 'Bloomberg Terminal' meets algorithmic power. Serious, dark, dense, trustworthy.
Use JetBrains Mono for all numbers, prices, crypto pairs (BTC/USDT), and P&L metrics.
Use Chivo for headings. Do NOT use Inter.
Build a 'Bot Control Center' widget prominently featuring START/PAUSE toggles.
Include a 'Daily Goal Progress' widget showing progress toward $1,000.
Integrate a Live Chart area (mocked Recharts if real data isn't ready) with high contrast.
Create a 'Recent Trades' table using strict monospaced columns.
Avoid soft shadows entirely. Use 1px borders (border-white/10) to separate panels. Adhere to 'MODE B: CONTROL ROOM' grid.
